ASHWATER.description: Exhaust  any number of cards in your  Hand .

ATTACK_POTION.description: Choose  1  of  3  random Attack cards to add into your  Hand . It's free to play this turn.

BEETLE_JUICE.description: Enemy's attacks deal  30%  less damage for the next  4  turns.

BLESSING_OF_THE_FORGE.description: Upgrade  all cards in your  Hand  for the rest of combat.

BLOOD_POTION.description: Heal for  20%  of your Max HP.

BOTTLED_POTENTIAL.description: Shuffle ALL your cards into your  Draw Pile . Draw  5  cards.

CLARITY.description: Draw  1  card. At the start of your next  3  turns, draw  1  additional card.

COLORLESS_POTION.description: Choose  1  of  3  random Colorless cards to add into your  Hand . It's free to play this turn.

COSMIC_CONCOCTION.description: Add  3   Upgraded  Colorless cards into your  Hand .

CUNNING_POTION.description: Add  3   Upgraded   Shivs  into your  Hand .

DISTILLED_CHAOS.description: Play the top  3  cards of your  Draw Pile .

DROPLET_OF_PRECOGNITION.description: Choose a card in your  Draw Pile  and add it into your  Hand .

DUPLICATOR.description: This turn, your next card is played an extra time.

ENTROPIC_BREW.description: Fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.

ESSENCE_OF_DARKNESS.description: Channel  a  Dark  for each of your Orb Slots.

FAIRY_IN_A_BOTTLE.description: When you would die, instead this potion is discarded and you heal to  30%  of your Max HP.

FLEX_POTION.description: Gain  5   Strength . At the end of your turn, lose  5   Strength .

FOUL_POTION.description: Deal  12  damage to EVERYONE.   Can be thrown at the Merchant for  100   Gold  instead.

GAMBLERS_BREW.description: Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.

GIGANTIFICATION_POTION.description: The next Attack you play deals triple damage.

LIQUID_MEMORIES.description: Put a card from your  Discard Pile  into your  Hand . It costs  0    this turn.

OROBIC_ACID.description: Add a random Attack, Skill, and Power into your  Hand . They're free to play this turn.

POTION_OF_BINDING.description: Apply  1   Weak  and  1   Vulnerable  to ALL enemies.

POWDERED_DEMISE.description: Enemy loses  9  HP at the end of each of its turns.

POWER_POTION.description: Choose  1  of  3  random Power cards to add into your  Hand . It's free to play this turn.

RADIANT_TINCTURE.description: Gain  . Gain an additional   at the start of your next  3  turns.

SHACKLING_POTION.description: ALL enemies lose  7   Strength  this turn.

SHIP_IN_A_BOTTLE.description: Gain  10   Block . Next turn, gain  10   Block .

SKILL_POTION.description: Choose  1  of  3  random Skill cards to add into your  Hand . It's free to play this turn.

SNECKO_OIL.description: Draw  7  cards. Randomize the cost of cards in your  Hand  this turn.

SOLDIERS_STEW.description: All cards containing Strike gain  1   Replay  this combat.

SPEED_POTION.description: Gain  5   Dexterity . At the end of your turn, lose  5   Dexterity .

TOUCH_OF_INSANITY.description: Choose a card in your  Hand . It is free to play this combat.
